description: Perform a 'hot swap' patient monitoring handoff in OpenICE by transitioning from a bedside Multiparameter Monitor to a portable Pulse Oximeter without losing data flow in the Vital Signs application. Capture a screenshot of the state where both devices are active and sending data simultaneously to /home/ga/Desktop/handoff_overlap.png. After disconnecting the Multiparameter Monitor, ensure the Vital Signs app remains active and receiving data from the Pulse Oximeter. Create a log file at /home/ga/Desktop/transport_log.txt containing 'Overlap achieved' and 'Bedside disconnected'.
